ContentDesc_Gok Tajaal - Enuo: The wandering minstrel strums a somber dirge, depicting a mighty denizen of that world without Light, struck down ere they could render all unto naught. But what if Enuo had emerged from the abyssal ocean stronger still? Would you and your comrades have triumphed over the fell sovereign, or been consigned to depths unending? Steeped in the leaden darkness of the void, each note of the minstrel's song brings you closer to that fateful encounter...
